name: coretex-evaluator-v2-ownerscope
_reclaimedRegionsNote: RetrievalKeys (lens; lensTopK/lensWeight) and Codebook (EvidencePolicy) are RECLAIMED in r4 — NOT valid miner surfaces (static lens + static EvidencePolicy both oracle-FAILED; admission-headroom ~0). The lens/evidencePolicy knobs below are INERT (no honest generator populates those regions). Slated for redefinition in substrate-r5 as a typed query-conditioned PolicyAtom region (SUBSTRATE_R5_POLICY_ATOMS.md). Do not present RetrievalKeys/Codebook as miner surfaces.

firstStageTopKSelection.reason: DEFAULT_PROFILE placeholder; calibration Run 1 replaces this with the production-pinned method and evidence.

_evalSemanticsNote: temporalStaleContrast=true + w_temporal 0.08->0.13 / w_retrieval 0.75->0.70 (at the 0.70 floor): the temporal-specific answer-vs-contrast fix — stale docs are CONTRAST evidence (0 nDCG reward, recall tracked separately as temporalContrastRecall), not a correct answer to the current value. Real-Qwen CONFIRMED to recover in-context temporal yield 0.30->0.5625 (PROFILE_QREL_YIELD_EXPERIMENT.md). Eval-semantics only; NOT a substrate change / protocol epoch. Re-pin baseline before launch signing.
_candidateNote: CANDIDATE, NOT launch-signed. categoryLensScoreInheritance=0.3 is current best, not pinned (needs 3-seed adversarial + larger sample sign-off). rel-mode no-query is a corpus-construction property (bridge builds no query->answer edges). Full bundleHash re-sign is a launch step. Requires deriveQueryPack-on-V2 (item 4) before production-faithful pack derivation. majorDeltaThreshold=10 is a P1/P2-validation candidate (isMajorDelta is an ABSOLUTE new-eval_hidden count, new-prev>=threshold); LAUNCH must recalibrate to ~5% of the launch corpus eval_hidden population (cf old 679k launch profile=5076 for 679k). Baseline UNPINNED (computed at runtime per-epoch by the harness); launch signing pins baseline{ParentScorePpm,VariancePpm,EvalSeedHex} from a fixed-seed measurement.
_controllerNote: Launch controller calibration (2026-05-24 same-seed A/B, V2_DGEN1_ENDURANCE_FINDINGS.md §Controller-calibration A/B): qualityHighThresholdMult=1 lets the decay branch engage (qualityHighThreshold = mult × targetAdvances ≤ honestAttempts; mult=2 made threshold>attempts so decay was unreachable and small_drift_up ratcheted the bar, rejecting positive-delta pairs); rampUpMaxRatio 1.1 (gentler than 1.5) avoids over-ramping. Recovered temporal runway 51->64 (+25%) with anti-cheat 0/180. decayRatio 0.8 / smallDriftRatio 1.05 carried from C3. Sourced into the harness via controllerParamsFromProfile().
